task: Move the fish to the left of the green towel
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A stainless steel pot with a handle sits on a wooden countertop. Inside the pot is a single orange fish. A green cloth and a gray object are on the counter to the right of the pot. The pot is rigid with a side handle; the fish is inside the pot. STRATEGY - Reach the pot, grasp its handle to lift it, transport it to the left side of the green cloth, and place it down. Failure modes include dropping the pot during transport or misplacing it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the pot body; Step 2 grasp the handle for secure hold; Step 3 transport leftward; Step 4 place on the counter to the left of the cloth.

Goal: on(pot, counter); left_of(pot, green_cloth)
Scene: pot, fish, green_cloth, counter
Step 1: reach(pot)
  affordance_region: the body of the pot
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, pot, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, pot) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(pot)
  affordance_region: the side handle of the pot
  contact: holding(pot) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(pot)
Step 3: transport(pot -> left_of(green_cloth))
  affordance_region: an empty area on the counter to the left of the green cloth
  spatial: left_of(pot, green_cloth) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(pot)
  done_when: left_of(pot, green_cloth)
Step 4: place(pot -> counter)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the counter to the left of the green cloth
  contact: surface_contact(pot, counter) [completion]; released(pot) [completion]
  pose: stable(pot) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(pot, counter) AND released(pot)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the side handle of the pot
an empty area on the counter to the left of the green cloth
an empty area on the counter to the left of the green cloth
